name: I Walked Around a City I Didn't Know at All
original_name: 全っっっっっ然知らない街を歩いてみたものの
overview: Seino, a manga artist, who lives in Tokyo realises belatedly one day that there are many towns which he has never known when he looks at the map. He goes on a journey to explore these places since he doesn't want to die without knowing about them.

trailers.title: 【公式】主演・ムロツヨシからスペシャルメッセージ！フジテレビ『全っっっっっ然知らない街を歩いてみたものの』
